LanguageData.ClashOfRim_PlayerProxy.label: distant colony
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_PlayerProxy.description: Another colony on the same planet. You can form alliances, trade, exchange support, or fall into open conflict if relations collapse.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_ServerMercenaries.label: frontier mercenaries
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_ServerMercenaries.description: A mercenary company operating between frontier colonies. Members can be hired for short assignments, follow the employer's orders during the job, and leave when it ends.
